zh.lifeSummary: 當Barbara Douglas於1280年出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾道格拉斯 卡素時，她的父親Sir William 'Le Hardi' of Douglas51歲，母親Lady Douglas40歲。她於1287年與Robert Keith Marischal of Scotland結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1350年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特卡素 加里享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Barbara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

variants.name: Barbra
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

en.lifeSummary: When Barbara Douglas was born in 1280, in Douglas Castle, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William 'Le Hardi' of Douglas, was 51 and her mother, Lady Douglas, was 40. She married Robert Keith Marischal of Scotland in 1287. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1350, in Castle Cary, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

Elle a épousé Robert Keith Marischal of Scotland en 1287. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1350, à Castle Cary, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Barbara Douglasが1280年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアドウグラス カストルで生まれた時，父Sir William 'Le Hardi' of Douglasは51歳，母Lady Douglasは40歳であった。1287年にRobert Keith Marischal of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1350年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトカストル カーイで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Barbara Douglas(이)가 1280년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 더글라스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William 'Le Hardi' of Douglas(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Douglas(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1287년 Robert Keith Marischal of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 카스틀 카리에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.
